query: SELECT c.id, c.status, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.duration, c.callTimestamp, c.callSource, c.teamMemberName, LEFT(c.recordingUrl, 100) as recordingUrlPreview, c.createdAt FROM calls c WHERE c.status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT c.id, c.status, c.contactName, c.contactPhone, c.duration, c.callTimestamp, c.callSource, c.teamMemberName, LEFT(c.recordingUrl, 100) as recordingUrlPreview, c.createdAt FROM calls c WHERE c.status IN ('pending', 'transcribing', 'classifying', 'grading') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
